problems.diagnostic: Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types
problems.cause: AGREE annex with guarantee statements is placed in system implementation scope
problems.minimal_edit: Move the entire AGREE annex block from Microwave_Control.Impl to Microwave_Control

problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: Guarantee statements reference connection names as expressions instead of boolean conditions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace connection names with boolean expressions that relate input ports to output ports

problems.diagnostic: right side of binary expression '=>' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Guarantee statements reference connection names instead of valid boolean expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Rewrite guarantee expressions to use valid boolean logic with input/output port relationships

problems.diagnostic: Expression for guarantee statement is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Guarantee statements reference connection names instead of valid boolean expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Rewrite guarantee expressions to use valid boolean logic with input/output port relationships

executor_steps: Remove the AGREE annex block from Microwave_Control.Impl
Add a new AGREE annex block to the Microwave_Control component type
In the new AGREE annex, replace guarantee statements with valid boolean expressions that relate input ports to output ports
Ensure all guarantee expressions are valid AGREE boolean expressions using only visible identifiers
